name: loan_amount_positive
expression: loan_amount IS NOT NULL AND loan_amount > 0
description: Loan amount must be present and positive — system invariant; no valid mortgage without a loan amount

name: loan_purpose_valid_enum
description: Loan purpose must be a recognized MISMO/URLA enumeration; invalid values break downstream AUS and HMDA routing

name: loan_type_valid_enum
description: Loan type must be a recognized enumeration for investor delivery and compliance routing

name: borrower_last_name_present
expression: borrower_last_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(borrower_last_name)) > 0
description: Borrower last name is required — cannot process an application without borrower identity

name: ltv_reasonable_range
expression: ltv_percent IS NULL OR (ltv_percent > 0 AND ltv_percent <= 105)
description: LTV > 105% or <= 0 indicates a data extraction error or impossible transaction; route to quarantine

name: dti_reasonable_range
expression: debt_to_income_ratio IS NULL OR (debt_to_income_ratio > 0 AND debt_to_income_ratio < 100)
description: DTI outside 0-100% range is invalid; drop record to quarantine for human review

name: interest_rate_reasonable
expression: interest_rate_percent IS NULL OR (interest_rate_percent > 0 AND interest_rate_percent < 30)
description: Interest rate outside 0-30% range is likely an extraction error; route to quarantine

name: loan_term_standard_values
expression: loan_term_months IS NULL OR loan_term_months IN (60, 84, 120, 180, 240, 300, 360, 480)
description: Loan term should be a standard product term (e.g., 360 for 30-year); unusual terms flagged for review

name: hmda_reportable_fields_present
expression: property_state IS NOT NULL AND occupancy_type IS NOT NULL AND loan_amount IS NOT NULL
description: HMDA LAR requires state, occupancy type, and loan amount; missing values prevent regulatory reporting

name: purchase_price_for_purchase
description: Purchase transactions should have a purchase price; missing value may indicate extraction failure
